headline: DRYDEN GOLD Drills 4.25m @ 32.87 g/t Au Incl. 252 g/t Over 0.5m — Three New High-Grade Zones at Gold Rock
snippet: Dryden Gold (TSXV) hit three new high-grade zones at its Big Master Gold System — Sparrow and Ruby are 300m step-outs from known zones, with best intercept 4.25m grading 32.87 g/t Au including a 0.50m bonanza of 252 g/t Au.

headline: GOLD SURGES to $4,850 as US-Iran Ceasefire Declared — Silver ROCKETS 7% to $77/oz
snippet: A two-week US-Iran ceasefire triggered a dollar reversal and oil selloff, sending gold up over 3% to $4,850 and silver surging nearly 7% to $77/oz — the best single-day move for the white metal in months.

headline: JPMorgan Calls Gold Miner SELLOFF a Buying Opportunity — GDX Down 20%, $6,300 Year-End Target Intact
snippet: JPMorgan argues the ~20% GDX drop fits a familiar market-shock pattern, pointing to 80% average miner rebounds in six months post-trough. Top picks AngloGold and Fresnillo; EMEA miners trade at just 5x spot EV/EBITDA with ~10% FCF yield.

headline: AMERICAS GOLD & SILVER Discovers 4,896 g/t Ag and 3.95% Cu — Launches 64,000m Drill Campaign at Galena
snippet: Americas Gold and Silver (TSX: USA) found 10 new high-grade veins at Galena Complex — seven silver-copper-antimony and three silver-lead — with a best intercept of 4,896 g/t Ag and 3.95% Cu over 1.3m. Company is now running its largest-ever drilling campaign.

headline: COPPER HITS All-Time High Above $13,000/Tonne on Supply Squeeze and Tariff Fears
snippet: Copper futures settled around $5.87/lb for a third straight weekly advance, driven by tariff-related supply anxiety despite LME warehouse stocks climbing to an eight-year high. US-Iran ceasefire optimism added further fuel to the rally.

headline: Core Lithium GREENLIGHTS Finniss Restart — $205M Secured With Glencore, Mining Starts May 2026
snippet: Core Lithium approved FID on Finniss after locking in A$290M in funding including a $70M Glencore convertible note. The Northern Territory spodumene mine was on care-and-maintenance since 2024; first concentrate delivery expected Q3 2026.

headline: Anglo American and Teck Merge to Form $53B 'Anglo Teck' — Top-5 Global Copper Producer
snippet: Shareholders approved the all-share merger of equals creating Anglo Teck, a Canadian-headquartered entity with 1.2Mt annual copper output and 70%+ copper exposure. Regulatory approvals across nine jurisdictions target completion between Sept 2026 and March 2027.

headline: Mining M&A Reaches 13-Year High — $93.7B in 2025 Deals, Mega-Deals Up 68% From 2024
snippet: Global mining M&A hit $93.7B in 2025 — the highest since 2012 — with billion-dollar mega-deals rising 68% year-over-year. Gold was the most targeted commodity; energy transition metals drew heavy strategic interest. January 2026 opened with $11B across 85 transactions.

headline: GOLD STOCKS Spring Rally Loading — GDX Miners Poised for Record Q1'26 Profits, 11th Quarter of Growth
snippet: GoldSeek analysis highlights the historically powerful mid-March to early-June seasonal window for gold miners. GDX recently broke above the $42–$46 resistance zone; Q1'26 unit profits for the GDX top 25 are expected to double year-over-year for the 11th consecutive quarter.

headline: Silver Demand to Outstrip Supply for SIXTH Straight Year — Structural Deficit Deepening
snippet: The global silver market faces another structural deficit in 2026 as physical investment offtake rises 20% and industrial demand — especially solar and data-centre cooling — absorbs record supply. Silver has surged 150%+ over the past year.

headline: URANIUM HITS $101/lb on AI Data-Centre Nuclear Boom — U.S. DOE Commits $2.7B for Domestic Enrichment
snippet: Uranium spot prices surged 25% in January to top $101/lb before pulling back on Iran war uncertainty. AI-driven electricity demand is reinforcing the nuclear investment case while a slow mine development pipeline keeps the structural supply deficit intact.

headline: China Imports 790+ Tonnes of Silver in Early 2026 — Solar Sector Absorbs Record Volumes
snippet: China's early-2026 silver imports exceed 790 tonnes, driven by surging solar panel production. Combined with strong investment demand, the data reinforces the silver supply deficit picture even as prices pulled back sharply this week.

headline: Troilus Mining Launches 40,000m Drill Campaign — Near-Mine Gold-Copper Resource Growth in Quebec
snippet: Troilus Mining (TSX: TLG) is running one of its most aggressive exploration seasons with 40,000m of drilling targeting near-mine resource growth, high-grade definition, and regional targets at its Quebec gold-copper project.
